description: Record a corporate spin-off event for Microsoft (MSFT) in the JStock portfolio where a division was spun off into NVIDIA (NVDA). You currently hold 50 shares of MSFT purchased for a total of $18,725.00 ($374.50/share). Based on the spin-off terms (0.1 NVDA shares for every 1 MSFT share, with 90% of the cost basis remaining with MSFT and 10% allocated to NVDA), update the existing MSFT transaction in 'My Portfolio' with the adjusted cost basis and the comment 'Spinoff Adjustment'. Record a new buy transaction for the NVDA shares received using today's date, the allocated cost basis, and the comment 'Received from MSFT Spinoff'. Do not modify the existing 25 shares of NVDA already in the portfolio.
